creator: ziaee@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm also experiencing this on an Alder Lake laptop on 15-CURRENT, but haven't noticed it causing any problems.

Seemingly relevant lines from dmesg:
```
[1.000083] efirtc0: <EFI Realtime Clock>
[1.000084] efirtc0: registered as a time-of-day clock, resolution 1.000000s
[1.000085] smbios0: <System Management BIOS> at iomem 0x48808000-0x4880801e
[1.000086] smbios0: Version: 3.4, BCD Revision: 3.4
[1.000087] aesni0: <AES-CBC,AES-CCM,AES-GCM,AES-ICM,AES-XTS,SHA1,SHA256>
[1.000088] acpi0: <DELL Dell Inc>
[1.005910] hpet0: <High Precision Event Timer> iomem 0xfed00000-0xfed003ff on acpi0
[1.005911] Timecounter "HPET" frequency 19200000 Hz quality 950
[1.005920] Event timer "HPET" frequency 19200000 Hz quality 350
[1.005921] Event timer "HPET1" frequency 19200000 Hz quality 340
[1.005922] Event timer "HPET2" frequency 19200000 Hz quality 340
[1.005923] Event timer "HPET3" frequency 19200000 Hz quality 340
[1.005924] Event timer "HPET4" frequency 19200000 Hz quality 340
[1.005925] Event timer "HPET5" frequency 19200000 Hz quality 340
[1.005926] Event timer "HPET6" frequency 19200000 Hz quality 340
[1.005927] Event timer "HPET7" frequency 19200000 Hz quality 340
[1.005929] atrtc0: <AT realtime clock> port 0x70-0x77 irq 8 on acpi0
[1.005930] atrtc0: Warning: Couldn't map I/O.
[1.005931] atrtc0: registered as a time-of-day clock, resolution 1.000000s
[1.005932] Event timer "RTC" frequency 32768 Hz quality 0
[1.005933] attimer0: <AT timer> port 0x40-0x43,0x50-0x53 irq 0 on acpi0
[1.005934] Timecounter "i8254" frequency 1193182 Hz quality 0
[1.005935] Event timer "i8254" frequency 1193182 Hz quality 100
[1.005936] Timecounter "ACPI-fast" frequency 3579545 Hz quality 900
[1.005937] acpi_timer0: <24-bit timer at 3.579545MHz> port 0x1808-0x180b on acpi0
[1.005940] acpi_ec0: <Embedded Controller: GPE 0x6e> port 0x930,0x934 on acpi0
```
sysctl posted by another commenter:
```
# sysctl kern.eventtimer
kern.eventtimer.choice: LAPIC(600) HPET(350) HPET1(340) HPET2(340) HPET3(340) HPET4(340) HPET5(340) HPET6(340) HPET7(340) i8254(100) RTC(0)
```
